title: Privacy Policy - Hospeda
description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information at Hospeda.
heading: Privacy Policy

informationCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationCollection.body: We collect personal information you provide to us directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and address. We also collect usage data automatically when you browse our platform, including IP address, browser type, and pages visited.
informationCollection.intro: We collect information you provide to us directly, such as:

automaticCollection.title: 2. Information Collected Automatically
automaticCollection.intro: We also collect information automatically when you use our service:

informationUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
informationUse.body: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send important notifications, and personalize your experience. We may also use your data for analytics, marketing, and security purposes.
informationUse.intro: We use the information we collect to:

purposes.communication: Communicate with you about your account
purposes.marketing: Send updates and promotions (with your consent)

informationSharing.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
informationSharing.body: We do not sell your personal information. We share data with service providers who help us operate the platform, always under strict confidentiality agreements. We may also share information when required by law.
informationSharing.intro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:

circumstances.business: In the event of a merger or business acquisition

cookiesTracking.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookiesTracking.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve the functionality of our website, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect some platform features.
cookiesTracking.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, remember your preferences, and analyze how our site is used. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

dataSecurity.title: 6. Data Security
dataSecurity.body: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction. However, no internet transmission system is completely secure.
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of internet transmission is 100% secure.

yourRights.title: 7. Your Rights
yourRights.body: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, or object to the processing of your personal data. You may also request data portability or withdraw your consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us through the available channels.

rights.object: Object to the processing of your data
rights.withdraw: Withdraw your consent at any time

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless the law requires or permits a longer retention period.

internationalTransfers.title: 9. International Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure that such transfers comply with applicable data protection laws.

minors.title: 10. Minors
minors.content: Our services are not directed at individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors without verifiable parental consent.

policyChanges.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
policyChanges.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on our website.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions or concerns about our privacy policy or the handling of your personal data, you can contact us through the communication channels available on our platform. We will respond to your inquiries as soon as possible.
contact.intro: To exercise your rights or if you have questions about this policy, contact us:

page.title: Privacy Policy
page.description: Privacy policy and data protection for Hospeda
